response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, extensive exposure to cloud platforms (AWS), and relevant work on agentic workflows and MCP frameworks, but lacks explicit evidence of 8+ years in production-grade AI systems, vector databases, RAG architectures, or direct GenAI customer-facing leadership — his AI exposure is implied but not deeply documented.
strengths: Proven experience with agentic workflows and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling at re:cinq
Strong cloud infrastructure background with AWS CDK and Kubernetes deployments
Demonstrated technical leadership through mentoring, workshops, and open-source contributions
concerns: No clear evidence of 8+ years focused on production-grade AI/GenAI systems
Missing explicit experience with vector databases or RAG architecture implementation
Limited documentation of customer-facing technical leadership or enterprise AI deployment
